name: com.brassworks.sidecar.level-dressing-set01
description: Unity-only sidecar package for dense steampunk corridor and room dressing props: riveted trim, pipe junctions, pressure tanks, valve clusters, gauges, caged lamps, kick plates, soot decals, gear housings, warning placards, rail feet, vent stacks, and service panels.

samples.description: Sidecar preview notes and Unity menu commands for generated proof renders.
